Lich.name: 巫妖 Lich
Lich.description:
生命值 362; 重伤 181
Regeneration 10 (if the lich takes radiant 伤害, regeneration doesn’t function on its next turn)
抗性 10 necrotic 免疫 disease, poison 		先攻 +14 | 行动点 1 | 豁免 +2
AC 38Fort 33Ref 38Will 38
速度 6
属性力量 12 (+13)
体质 18 (+16)		敏捷 15 (+14)
智力 25 (+19)		感知 15 (+14)
魅力 21 (+17)
语言 Common, Elven
阵营 Evil
技能 Arcana +24, History +24, Insight +19感官 黑暗视觉
被动 Perception 24 | Insight 29

[[/roll 0#<b>Necrotic Aura</b> (Necrotic) aura 5; any living 生物 that enters or starts its turn in the aura takes 5 necrotic 伤害.]] 黯蚀灵气 Necrotic Necrotic Aura (Necrotic) aura 5; any living 生物 that enters or starts its turn in the aura takes 5 necrotic 伤害.

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Shadow Ray</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +28 vs Reflex; 3d8+7 necrotic 伤害. </p>]] (➶) 暗影射线 Shadow Shadow Ray (standard, at-will) ✦ Necrotic

标准动作 [[/roll 3d8+7#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Shadow Ray</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +28 vs Reflex; 3d8+7 necrotic 伤害. </p>]]

远程 20 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Necrotic Orb</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +28 vs Fortitude; 3d8+7 necrotic 伤害, and the target is stunned until the end of the lich’s next turn. </p>]]

+28 vs 反射；3d8+7黯蚀伤害。 [[/roll 3d8+7#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Necrotic Orb</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +28 vs Fortitude; 3d8+7 necrotic 伤害, and the target is stunned until the end of the lich’s next turn. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Entropic Pulse </b> (standard, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Area burst 2 within 20; +28 vs Reflex; 6d6+7 necrotic 伤害. </p>]]

[[/roll 6d6+7#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Entropic Pulse </b> (standard, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Area burst 2 within 20; +28 vs Reflex; 6d6+7 necrotic 伤害. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Second Wind </b> (standard; encounter) ✦ <b>Healing</b></p><p>The lich spends a healing surge and regains 90 hit points. The lich gains a +2 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn.</p>]]

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Indestructible</b></p><p>When a lich is reduced to 0 hit points, its body and possessions crumble into dust, but it is not destroyed. It reappears (along with its possessions) in 1d10 days within 1 square of its phylactery, unless the phylactery is also found and destroyed.</p>]] 不可摧毁 Indestructible

当巫妖生命值降至0时，其身体和物品化为尘土，但并未被摧毁。除非其命匣也被找到并摧毁，否则巫妖（连同其物品）会在1d10天后出现在其命匣1格范围内。 [[/roll 1d10 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Indestructible</b></p><p>When a lich is reduced to 0 hit points, its body and possessions crumble into dust, but it is not destroyed. It reappears (along with its possessions) in 1d10 days within 1 square of its phylactery, unless the phylactery is also found and destroyed.</p>]]

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Regeneration 10.name: 再生 10 Regeneration 10
Regeneration 10.description:
再生 10 Regeneration 10

特性

如果巫妖受到光耀伤害，则其下一回合再生不生效。

Necrotic Aura.name: 黯蚀灵气 Necrotic Aura
Necrotic Aura.description:
黯蚀灵气 Necrotic Aura

灵气：群体效应·灵气 5

任何进入灵气或在灵气内开始其回合的活物受到5点黯蚀伤害。

Shadow Ray.name: 暗影射线 Shadow Ray
Shadow Ray.description:
暗影射线 Shadow Ray

基本攻击·随意 ✦ 黯蚀

标准动作

远程 20

+28 vs 反射；3d8+7黯蚀伤害。

Necrotic Orb.name: 黯蚀球 Necrotic Orb
Necrotic Orb.description:
黯蚀球 Necrotic Orb

随意 ✦ 黯蚀

标准动作

远程 20

+28 vs 强韧；3d8+7黯蚀伤害，且目标晕眩直到巫妖下一回合结束。

Entropic Pulse.name: 熵能脉冲 Entropic Pulse
Entropic Pulse.description:
熵能脉冲 Entropic Pulse

充能 5-6 ✦ 黯蚀

标准动作

范围 爆发2 内20

+28 vs 反射；6d6+7黯蚀伤害。

Indestructible.name: 不可摧毁 Indestructible
Indestructible.description:
不可摧毁 Indestructible

特性

当巫妖生命值降至0时，其身体和物品化为尘土，但并未被摧毁。除非其命匣也被找到并摧毁，否则巫妖（连同其物品）会在1d10天后出现在其命匣1格范围内。

Second Wind.name: 第二风 Second Wind
Second Wind.description:
第二风 Second Wind

遭遇 ✦ 医疗

标准动作

巫妖花费一个医疗回复力并恢复90点生命值。巫妖在所有防御上获得+2加值，直到其下一回合开始。
